title: centaurea cochinchinensis
intro: Centaurea cochinchinensis, also known as noni or Indian mulberry, is a plant species that belongs to the family Moraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Centaurea cochinchinensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are available in various forms for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
